Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 ("Anti-Slapp Motion")
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Steve D. Baric, Esq. 949-677-3688, Baric Law, sbaric@bariclaw.com, for Plaintiff.
Hailyn Chen, Esq. 213-683-9548, 323-828-6927, Munger, tolles & olson, hailyn.chen@mto.com for Defendant. (In-person)
Newton Oldfather, Esq. 415-448-5167, Levin Oldfather LLP, Newton@LevinOldfather.com for Defendant
Court reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, 925-360-6065, reported. (In-person)

ARGUED. Ms. Chen sent a timely notice to contest the tentative ruling and presents arguments.
Mr. Baric responds: untimely, 2nd bite at demurrer they lost, substantia prejudice. Mr. Oldfather has nothing to add. Ms. Chen sites case authority on a late filing of an Anti Slapp motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 ("Anti-Slapp Motion").

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, 925-360-6065, reported. Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the Court sign an order denying Anti-Slapp motion to strike. (see scanned order for details)***
